name: education_water_allocation_model_redwood_lib_eq
premise: A Education district emergency desk is in a fast-moving incident involving education water allocation model redwood lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases student safety, continuity, and fairness. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Ravi Park
agents.identity: I am Ravi Park, accountable for a defensible call in Education when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Amina Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Amina Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Education.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Ravi Park must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Ravi Park do?
